title_slide: 5 apps that run my entire business
5 apps I use to run my entire business
The 5 apps behind everything I build
5 apps that run my whole business
slideshow_title: 5 apps that run my entire business
the 5 apps my whole business runs on
the only 5 apps I need to run my business
workflow_title: how I build a website, step by step
the 5 steps I follow to build any website
how I go from idea to live website
the tools I use to build a website, in order

claude.name: Claude
claude.tagline: an AI assistant I think through ideas with, it even helps me build my apps
copy:
Claude is an AI assistant you talk to like a person.
I use it to think through ideas and it even helps me build my apps.

Claude is an AI you can brainstorm and build with.
Like a co-founder that never sleeps.

Claude is an AI chat assistant.
Every project I make starts as a Claude conversation, it untangles my ideas and helps me make them real.

sitejourney.name: SiteJourney
sitejourney.tagline: an AI website builder, type one sentence about your business, get a real website in 60 seconds
copy:
SiteJourney is an AI website builder.
Describe your business in one sentence, get a full website in 60 seconds. No code, no design skills.

SiteJourney builds websites with AI.
One sentence in, a real live website out. 60 seconds.

SiteJourney is the fastest website builder I've used.
It turns one sentence about your business into a live site in under a minute.

checkvibe.name: checkvibe.dev
checkvibe.tagline: a website checker for SEO, AEO and security, paste a link and get a report of what to fix in 30 seconds
copy:
checkvibe.dev checks your site's SEO, AEO and security.
Paste a link, get a full report of what to fix in 30 seconds before you launch.

checkvibe.dev is the check I run before every launch.
SEO, AI answer readiness and security holes, all in one 30-second report.

checkvibe.dev scans any website for SEO, AEO and security issues.
It finds what's broken before Google and hackers do, and tells you exactly what to fix.

convex.name: Convex
convex.tagline: a database and backend for apps, stores all my data and logins and updates the screen in real time
copy:
Convex is a database and backend for apps.
It stores all my data and logins and keeps everything in sync in real time.

Convex handles everything behind the scenes of an app.
Data, users, live updates, all wired up in minutes instead of weeks.

Convex is where my app's data lives and stays in sync.
Set it up once and the whole engine room just works.

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.tagline: an AI code editor, I describe what I want in plain English and it builds it with me
copy:
Cursor is a code editor with AI built in.
I describe what I want in plain English, it writes the code. Done in hours, not weeks.

Cursor is an app for building apps.
The AI inside does half the work, I type plain English and it turns into a real product.

Cursor is an AI coding tool.
I barely write code by hand anymore, it builds whole features from my descriptions.

posthog.name: PostHog
posthog.tagline: an analytics tool that shows me exactly what people do in my app, every click, every exit
copy:
PostHog is an analytics tool for apps and websites.
It shows me every click and where people give up. No more guessing.

PostHog tracks what visitors actually do in your app.
It even replays their visits like a video, so I see my app through their eyes.

PostHog is like a camera inside my app.
If people get stuck somewhere, I see it instantly. Every decision starts there.

supabase.name: Supabase
supabase.tagline: a database for apps, stores all my data and logins, the whole engine room in one place
copy:
Supabase is a database for apps.
It stores all my users, logins and data, the whole engine room in one place.

Supabase handles everything behind the scenes of an app.
User accounts and data, ready in minutes instead of weeks.

Supabase is where all my app's data lives.
Logins, files, everything. Set it up once, forget about it.

notion.name: Notion
notion.tagline: a notes and planning app, every plan, idea and to-do in one place
copy:
Notion is a notes and planning app.
Every idea, plan and to-do lives there so nothing slips. My second brain.

Notion is like a notebook, planner and to-do list in one app.
It's mission control for my whole business.

Notion is an app for organizing your work and life.
If it's not in Notion, it doesn't exist. I plan everything there before I build it.

vercel.name: Vercel
vercel.tagline: a hosting service, it puts my apps live on the internet with one click
copy:
Vercel is a hosting service, it puts websites on the internet.
One click and my app is live for the whole world.

Vercel takes the app on my laptop and puts it online.
No servers to think about, live in under a minute.

Vercel is how my projects get on the internet.
It makes launching boring, in the best way.

figma.name: Figma
figma.tagline: a design app where I draw every screen before I build it
copy:
Figma is a design app.
Every screen of my apps gets drawn here before I build the real thing.

Figma is where you sketch what an app will look like.
Easy to change a drawing, hard to change a finished app.

Figma is a drawing board for apps and websites.
My ideas become something I can see before I build them for real.

github.name: GitHub
github.tagline: where builders store their code, it saves every version of my work so I can never lose anything
copy:
GitHub is where programmers store their work.
It saves every version so I can never lose anything.

GitHub is like a time machine for my projects.
If I break something, I just roll back to yesterday.

GitHub keeps a copy of every version of every project.
It's the safety net under everything I build.

framer.name: Framer
framer.tagline: a no-code website builder, design by dragging things around, hit publish and it's live
copy:
Framer is a website builder.
I design pages by dragging things around, hit publish and they're live. No code.

Framer lets you design and launch a website without code.
My pages go from idea to live the same day.

Framer is a design tool that publishes straight to the web.
No developers needed for my websites.

higgsfield.name: Higgsfield
higgsfield.tagline: an AI that makes my photos, ads and videos, no camera or designer needed
copy:
Higgsfield is an AI that makes images and videos.
Every visual I post starts there, no camera, no designer.

Higgsfield generates photos, ads and videos from a sentence.
It makes my content look expensive.

Higgsfield is an AI content studio.
A week of visuals in one hour, I just describe what I want.

obsidian.name: Obsidian
obsidian.tagline: a private notes app, everything saved on my own computer forever
copy:
Obsidian is a note-taking app.
Everything is saved on my own computer, fast, private, and all mine.

Obsidian is where my notes and ideas live.
They link together like a map of my brain, stored on my own machine forever.

Obsidian is a private notes app, no cloud needed.
Messy thoughts go in, plans come out.

antigravity.name: Antigravity
antigravity.tagline: Google's AI builder, I give it a job and it plans and does it by itself
copy:
Antigravity is Google's AI coding agent.
I describe a task and it plans, builds and checks it by itself.

Antigravity is an AI from Google that works on its own.
I hand it the big boring changes and it works through my whole project.

Antigravity is an AI that builds things without hand-holding.
It does the work, I check it and ship.

railway.name: Railway
railway.tagline: a hosting service that keeps my apps' behind-the-scenes machinery running, zero headaches
copy:
Railway is a hosting service for apps.
It keeps the behind-the-scenes machinery running, zero headaches.

Railway runs the server side of my apps.
I stopped fighting with servers, it keeps everything alive while I sleep.

Railway is where the invisible parts of my apps run.
From idea to running app in minutes, it handles the heavy lifting.

lovable.name: Lovable
lovable.tagline: an AI app builder, describe an app in a sentence and it builds the whole thing for you
copy:
Lovable is an AI app builder.
Describe an app in a sentence and it builds the whole thing for you.

Lovable turns a text description into a working app.
It's my zero-to-demo button for testing ideas fast.

Lovable builds apps from plain English.
A paragraph in, a clickable app out. Fastest way to make an idea real.

pinterest.name: Pinterest
pinterest.tagline: a visual search engine where I find design ideas and get free visitors to my websites
copy:
Pinterest is a visual search engine, people hunt for ideas there.
I find design inspiration and my pins send free visitors to my sites.

Pinterest is where people search with pictures instead of words.
Half my design taste comes from there. The other half? Free traffic.

Pinterest is an idea board the whole internet shares.
Ideas in, free visitors out. It quietly works for my business every day.

manus.name: Manus
manus.tagline: an AI that actually does tasks for you, like an intern that never sleeps
copy:
Manus is an AI agent, it actually does tasks for you.
Like an intern that never sleeps, I give it a job and it just goes.

Manus is an AI that doesn't just chat, it does the work.
I hand it the boring tasks and it comes back with them done.

Manus is an AI assistant that works on its own.
It researches and organizes things while I do other stuff.

wisprflow.name: Wispr Flow
wisprflow.tagline: a dictation app, I talk, it types, way faster than my keyboard and it works in every app
copy:
Wispr Flow is a dictation app, you talk and it types.
Way faster than my keyboard and it works in every app.

Wispr Flow turns your voice into clean text anywhere.
Half my messages are spoken now, my fingers can't keep up.

Wispr Flow types what I say.
My emails and notes get written while I just talk.

sentry.name: Sentry
sentry.tagline: an error alarm for apps, tells me the second something breaks, before customers even notice
copy:
Sentry is an alarm system for apps.
The second something breaks in mine, my phone knows.

Sentry watches my apps for errors around the clock.
I fix problems before customers even notice them.

Sentry is a smoke detector for software.
It catches bugs the moment they happen, not when angry users email me.

vscode.name: VS Code
vscode.tagline: the free code editor where I build everything, every project starts and ends here
copy:
VS Code is a free code editor from Microsoft.
Every project I've ever launched was built inside it.

VS Code is the app programmers write code in.
Free, fast, and always open on my screen.

VS Code is my workshop.
The free app where everything I build actually happens.

mobbin.name: Mobbin
mobbin.tagline: a library of screenshots from the best apps, I copy what already works
copy:
Mobbin is a library of screenshots from the world's best apps.
I copy what already works instead of guessing.

Mobbin collects thousands of real app screens to learn from.
It's my design cheat code.

Mobbin shows you how the top apps design every screen.
Why guess when the best apps already solved it?

resend.name: Resend
resend.tagline: an email service that sends my apps' welcome messages, receipts and logins on autopilot
copy:
Resend is an email sending service for apps.
Welcome messages, receipts, logins, all sent automatically.

Resend sends emails on behalf of my apps.
Thousands go out every month and I do nothing.

Resend is the mail room of my apps.
Every automatic email my products send goes through it.

elevenlabs.name: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.tagline: an AI voice generator, turns my text into real-sounding voiceovers, no recording needed
copy:
ElevenLabs is an AI voice generator.
I type a script, it speaks it with a real-sounding voice.

ElevenLabs turns text into speech that sounds human.
All my voiceovers, zero microphones.

ElevenLabs gives my content a voice.
Type the words, pick a voice, the AI does the talking.

slideys.name: slideys.app
slideys.tagline: the app that made this exact slideshow, it generates ready-to-post TikTok slideshows for any app or niche in minutes
copy:
slideys.app made the exact slideshow you're swiping through right now.
Pick a format, it generates the slides, caption and hashtags, you just hit post.

slideys.app is how this post exists.
It builds viral TikTok slideshows like this one for any app or niche, ready to post in minutes.

slideys.app turns any product into a slideshow like this one.
This very post came out of it, slides, caption and hashtags included.
